description.ja-JP:
ブレードが3パーツに分解可能になり、性能をカスタマイズできる
カスタムラインのベイブレード。
ダウンフォースにより攻撃性能を高めたブレードと右回転時に
高速攻撃が可能なビットを組み合わせ、加速性能と弾き性能を
向上させたベイブレード。
ブレードはメタルが塗装され性能がアップしている。
description.en-US: A Custom Line BEYBLADE with a BLADE that can be disassembled into three parts to customize performance.\nCombines a BLADE that boosts attack performance via downforce with a BIT that enables high-speed attacks when spinning right, improving acceleration and repelling performance.\nThe BLADE is metal-coated to enhance performance.
description.zh-TW: 鋼鐵戰刃可分解為3個部件並可自訂性能的客製線陀螺。\n將藉由下壓力提升攻擊性能的鋼鐵戰刃與右迴旋時可進行高速攻擊的軸心結合，提升加速性能與反彈性能。\n鋼鐵戰刃為金屬塗裝，性能提升。
description.en-SG: A Custom Line BEYBLADE with a BLADE that can be disassembled into three parts to customize performance.\nCombines a BLADE that boosts attack performance via downforce with a BIT that enables high-speed attacks when spinning right, improving acceleration and repelling performance.\nThe BLADE is metal-coated to enhance performance.
description.ko-KR: BXG-51 드랜 브레이브 S6-60V에 포함.\n블레이드가 만들어내는 다운 포스가 비트 축 끝의 그립력을 높여 가속 성능과 튕겨내기 성능을 향상시킨다.
